title: beilia
intro: Beilia is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia, known scientifically as Clerodendrum inerme. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Beilia include relief from fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Beilia is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves or flowers in hot water.
